mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course_enrollments (student_id, schedule_id, enroll_time, status) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{scheduleId}, #{enrollTime}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE course_enrollments SET status = #{status} WHERE enrollment_id = #{enrollmentId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_enrollments WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId}
SELECT * FROM course_enrollments WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND schedule_id = #{scheduleId} LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_enrollments ce JOIN students s ON ce.student_id = s.student_id WHERE ce.schedule_id = #{scheduleId}
AND (s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR s.student_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
